location: Found lying on a corpse inside Old Altus Tunnel in Altus Plateau — the same 2-Stonesword-Key dungeon as the Great Club, but picked up on the way to the boss rather than earned by defeating it.
tactics: Uses the same fogged, Imp Statue entrance (2 Stonesword Keys) as the Great Club, off the valley northeast of Erdtree-Gazing Hill Grace
The corpse holding it sits along the path before the Stonedigger Troll boss fog — easy to walk past in the dark tunnel
It carries innate Fire damage but, unusually for an elemental colossal, can still be affected by external buffs
lore: Originally a mining tool used by stonedigger trolls — descendants of the giants — to crack open bedrock; some say such tools once doubled as ceremonial smithing implements from an age when smithing itself was treated as sacred.

builds.name: Strength/Faith fire build
builds.why: C-scaling Strength, some Faith scaling, and innate Fire damage that still accepts buffs make it a strong pick for a Strength/Faith fire-themed build.
